name: Rack of Lamb w/ Sun-Dried Cherry Sauce & Pars
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp each minced fresh rosemary and thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove fat cover from racks and French-trim the bones of any excess fat.
2. Whisk together marinade ingredients: olive oil, dry white wine, minced garlic, rosemary, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
3. Marinate lamb racks in the mixture for 6 hours or overnight in the refrigerator, turning occasionally.
4. Prepare Sun-Dried Cherry Sauce as directed in the recipe.
5. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. Roast the marinated lamb racks until they reach an internal temperature of 120-125°F (49-52°C), about medium-rare. Allow racks to rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
7. Cut each rack into double bone chops and arrange on warm plates.
8. Spoon Sun-Dried Cherry Sauce over the chops and arrange parsnip chips on top.
9. Garnish with fresh herb sprigs (thyme or rosemary) and serve immediately.
